message.content:
Run ALL of the following bash commands in the project directory C:\Users\User\citedby-ai and report EVERY result. This is a read-only audit. Do NOT modify any files.

**4.1 — Bundle size:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
npm run build 2>&1 | tail -40
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
ls -lhS dist/assets/*.js 2>/dev/null | head -10
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
ls -lhS dist/assets/*.css 2>/dev/null | head -5
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
du -sh dist/ 2>/dev/null
```

**4.2 — Lazy loading & code splitting:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -rn "React.lazy\|lazy(\|import(" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | head -20
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
grep -c "^import.*from.*pages/" App.tsx 2>/dev/null || echo "No static page imports in App.tsx"
```

**4.3 — Unnecessary re-renders:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Pages sans React.memo ==="
for f in pages/*.tsx; do
  if ! grep -q "React.memo\|memo(" "$f" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "  Sans memo: $(basename $f)"
  fi
done
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== useEffect sans deps array ==="
grep -rn "useEffect(() =>" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | grep -v "\[" | head -10
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Inline handlers ==="
grep -rn "onClick={() =>\|onChange={() =>" --include="*.tsx" --exclude-dir=node_modules . | wc -l
```

**4.4 — Images & assets:**
```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Images dans le projet ==="
find . -name "*.png" -o -name "*.jpg" -o -name "*.jpeg" -o -name "*.svg" -o -name "*.gif" | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .git
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Taille des images ==="
find . \( -name "*.png" -o -name "*.jpg" -o -name "*.svg" \) -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" -exec ls -lh {} \; 2>/dev/null
```

```bash
cd /c/Users/User/citedby-ai
echo "=== Images importees ==="
grep -rn "import.*\.\(png\|jpg\|svg\|gif\)" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.ts" --exclude-dir=node_modules .
```

Report ALL results verbatim. Group by section (4.1, 4.2, 4.3, 4.4).

content.text:
I'll run all the audit commands in parallel, grouped by section.

**Section 4.1 — Bundle size:**

input.description: Build production bundle and show last 40 lines
List JS assets by size (largest first)
